title: Spring security advisory (AV26-288)
description: Between March 23 and 26, 2026, Spring published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Spring Cloud Config   versions prior to 3.1.3, 4.1.9, 4.2.6, 4.3.2 and 5.0.2
Spring AI   versions prior to 1.0.5 and 1.1.4
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
